history.text: When is the thesis submission deadline?
The thesis submission deadline is April 15th. [C1]

scenarios.query: What if I miss it?

history.text: How do I request a passive semester?
You need to submit the request through the proper university administration workflow. [C1]

scenarios.query: Can I do that after the deadline?

history.text: What are the exam retake rules?
Retake options are defined in the academic regulations and depend on the exam policy. [C1]

scenarios.query: And is there usually a fee?

history.text: What are the internship requirements?
Internship completion is mandatory before graduation in the relevant curriculum. [C2]

scenarios.query: Does this apply to MSc as well?

history.text: How can I apply for Erasmus?
Application details are published by the faculty and international office channels. [C3]

scenarios.query: Who should I contact first?

history.text: Any recent student opportunity announcements?
Yes, there are recent faculty news updates about opportunities. [C1]

scenarios.query: What about deadlines in those?

history.text: How do I upload my thesis?
You need to follow the official upload workflow and submission window in Neptun. [C2]

scenarios.query: And after upload, what are the next defense preparation steps?

history.text: Can I change my thesis supervisor?
Yes, but it requires faculty approval and formal administration. [C3]

scenarios.query: Who approves it at ELTE IK?

history.text: Are there formatting requirements for the thesis?
Yes, thesis formatting and structural requirements are defined in official guidance. [C1]

scenarios.query: Do they also specify language requirements?

history.text: What documents do I need for internship administration?
Typically internship acceptance and completion/reference documents are required. [C2]

scenarios.query: Which one has to be submitted first?

history.text: Can I start internship in the 3rd semester?
Internship timing depends on curriculum constraints and progress requirements. [C1]

scenarios.query: Is there a minimum completed credit threshold before starting?

history.text: I am missing one prerequisite. What can I do?
You may submit a prerequisite-weakening request through the official process. [C3]

scenarios.query: What deadline applies to that request?

history.text: My fixed group classes overlap.
There is an official process for resolving clashing classes and attendance issues. [C1]

scenarios.query: Where exactly do I submit this request?

history.text: When does the exam period start?
Exam period dates are published in semester information materials. [C2]

scenarios.query: And when is the last possible exam date?

history.text: How is the final examination structured?
The final exam includes defined components and evaluation criteria from the program documents. [C1]

scenarios.query: Are practical components weighted differently than oral parts?

history.text: What do I need for absolutorium?
You must satisfy curriculum and credit requirements defined by the faculty regulations. [C2]

scenarios.query: Does unfinished internship block it?

history.text: I cannot register for a subject in Neptun.
This can happen due to timetable conflicts, missing prerequisites, or registration windows. [C3]

scenarios.query: How can I check which of those is causing my case?

history.text: I missed the passive semester request deadline.
Late requests may require a special justification and a formal exceptional procedure. [C1]

scenarios.query: What supporting documents should I attach?

history.text: I need to pay tuition in EUR.
There is a specific transfer workflow for tuition payments in EUR. [C2]

scenarios.query: Where do I verify the exact recipient account details?

history.text: How do I apply for a student card?
Student card issuance follows a documented administrative process and required data steps. [C1]

scenarios.query: Can I start classes while the card is still being processed?

history.text: I am an international student and I do not have TAJ yet.
You should follow the official TAJ and health insurance guidance for ELTE students. [C3]

scenarios.query: Which office should I contact first for this?

history.text: Can I transfer credits from another university?
Yes, through the formal credit transfer procedure with required supporting documentation. [C2]

scenarios.query: Is there a deadline each semester for submitting that?

history.text: I want to pick a specialization in CS.
Specialization options and curriculum maps are published in the educational plans. [C1]

scenarios.query: Where can I compare available tracks for the current intake?

history.text: I have a study administration problem in English.
You should contact the official student administration channels of the faculty. [C3]

scenarios.query: Is there a specific ELTE IK office email for this?

history.text: Which educational plan applies to me?
The applicable curriculum depends on your program and admission cohort. [C2]

scenarios.query: How do I confirm my cohort-specific version?

history.text: I want to apply for Erasmus from IK.
Application windows and conditions are announced via faculty/international channels. [C1]

scenarios.query: What happens if I submit after the posted deadline?

history.text: I submitted an exceptional academic request.
Processing follows the official request workflow and decision timeline. [C2]

scenarios.query: How can I check whether it was approved or still pending?

history.text: Can IK students take foreign language courses?
Yes, ELTE offers language course options under specific enrollment rules. [C3]

scenarios.query: Do those credits count into my degree requirements?

history.text: Do I need physical education subjects?
Physical education requirements are defined by program rules and faculty guidance. [C1]

scenarios.query: Can I get an exemption, and what is the process?

history.text: I forgot semester registration in Neptun.
Late registration has specific constraints and may require administrative handling. [C2]

scenarios.query: What are the consequences if I cannot register on time?
